title: gonolobus selloanus
intro: Gonolobus selloanus, also known as the Mexican climbing milkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Gonolobus selloanus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the skin.
